title: iris pallida
intro: Iris pallida, also known as the Dalmatian Iris or Greek iris, is a flowering plant species in the iris family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant contains medicinal compounds, including iridin and iridin glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Iris pallida include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. Iris pallida is commonly prepared as a tincture, infusion, or syrup, and is used in herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including bronchitis, asthma, and skin conditions.
